title: Moss Layers
description: Adds moss layers, which can be placed like snow layers.
body:
Moss Layers

Overview

A simple mod that adds moss layers, which can be placed like snow layers. There are 8 moss layers to a block. 

 

 

Crafting Recipe

The crafting recipe is 3 moss blocks in a line which yields 24 moss layers. 

 

 

Drops

Each moss layer drops itself. No tools or enchantments are required. 

 

 

Credit to our cats Nidalee, Nenya, Nooka, and Meniscus, who made this ten times harder to make but ten times more enjoyable.
